codeReview.summary: The fix adequately resolves the prior VAL-CROSS-008 failure. Restart tests now cross a real persistence boundary by serializing store state through JSON and rehydrating a new RelayMessageStore instance, and dedicated persistence tests were added to validate snapshot/fromSnapshot behavior.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Skill guidance requires an explicit handoff rationale when manual checks are not applicable for internal-only changes, but this handoff reports followedProcedure=true without interactiveChecks or an explicit non-applicability note.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/mors-global-worker/SKILL.md (step 8); mission handoff 2026-02-28T17-43-13-408Z__developer-launch-fix-restart-integrity-persistence-boundary__bbc285bb-1023-42e1-93b8-4187b9d811ed.json contains only commandsRun and no manual-check rationale.

summary: Pass. The original blocking gap (same-process shared in-memory store restart simulation) is addressed: VAL-CROSS-008 tests now persist+rehydrate across JSON boundaries and the new persistence unit suite validates state fidelity and store independence.
